description:
The MeshParticleRenderer component is a particle renderer that makes all particle instances in a particle system render as a specific mesh.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Material: The material the particles should have.
fields.Mesh: The mesh object to GPU instance to all particle points and render.
fields.Alignment: How to align the meshes with the particle transforms.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the renderer slot in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
